item.title: Pipeline Test Successful
item.description: This article was generated automatically by the NEATContent cron job to verify the full automation pipeline.

item.title: How Carnivore Diet Healed Severe Psoriasis
item.description: After 30 years of battling psoriasis covering 50% of his body, Phillip found relief through the carnivore diet. The gut-skin connection explained.

item.title: My 30-Day Carnivore Diet Experience
item.description: Real results after one month on an all-meat diet: gut issues resolved, skin cleared, energy stabilized. A detailed week-by-week breakdown.

item.title: What Is the Carnivore Diet?
item.description: A clear, no-nonsense overview of the carnivore diet — what to eat, the science behind it, and who it might help.
